$comment: Single source of truth for the mandatory operator bridge between the simplicio-loop runner and the production mutation boundary (simplicio-dev-cli). Every production diff MUST be produced through a bridge call whose output satisfies this schema; the runner blocks conclusion when `git diff` contains a file with no matching operator receipt (#135). Consumers (simplicio-runtime, MCP, or the CLI) must produce/emit the same operator receipt schema whether they invoke the dev-cli directly or through the bridge - AC 'CLI direta e MCP produzem o mesmo operator receipt schema'.

field_types.task_index: integer >= 1 — position of the task in the task-contract collection
field_types.task_id: string — stable task identity from the task-contract
field_types.ac_id: string — acceptance-criterion id the decided change is scoped to
field_types.rn_id: string — run/attempt id (RN) the change belongs to
field_types.task_contract_hash: string — sha256 collection_hash of the frozen task-contract
field_types.plan_hash: string — sha256 of the frozen plan (steps + candidate_targets)
field_types.mapper_pack_hash: string — sha256 of the mapper handoff context pack
field_types.decided_change: string — the concrete mutation the planner/AI decided, AC-scoped
field_types.authorized_targets: array<string> — plan targets the change may touch (bound-paths)
field_types.expected_validation: array<string> — tests/validation commands expected to run
field_types.checkpoint_id: string — id of the pre-mutation file snapshot for automatic rollback
field_types.retry_budget: integer in [0,3] — max operator retries (AC: 'até três retries')
field_types.safety_policy: object — kill-switch/STOP path + human gate + secret-scan policy

invariants: authorized_targets must be a non-empty subset of plan.candidate_targets for the task
decided_change must reference ac_id (the change is AC-scoped, never free-form)
checkpoint_id must be non-empty and captured BEFORE the first mutation (AC: 'Checkpoint ocorre antes da primeira mutação')

field_types.command: string — the resolved operator command stem (simplicio-dev-cli)
field_types.path: string — absolute path resolved from PATH (identity, not just `which`)
field_types.identity_ok: boolean — True iff resolved stem matches the expected operator identity
field_types.capabilities: array<string> — verbs the operator's --help surface advertises (task, --dry-run-task, --json, ...)
field_types.min_version: string — the minimum tolerated version tuple (e.g. '0.14.0')
field_types.version_ok: boolean — True iff parsed operator version >= min_version

invariants: identity is validated by identity/path/capability/min-version, NOT merely `which` (AC: 'Dev-cli é validado por identity/capability/min-version, não somente which')
a wrong homonym (path resolves but stem mismatches) MUST set identity_ok=false and block
a version below min_version MUST block before any mutation

field_types.schema: string — must equal 'simplicio.operator-receipt/v0' (or this contract's operator receipt schema)
field_types.execution_state: enum: dry_run | applied | no_change | failed | blocked
field_types.target: string — the AC-scoped target actually mutated
field_types.argv: array<string> — the exact operator command (redacted of secrets)
field_types.provider_config: object — {model, effort} of the remote model used (or empty if mechanical/local)
field_types.failure_fingerprint: string — stable 16-hex fingerprint of the failure signature
field_types.attempt: integer — 1-based attempt number within the retry budget
field_types.changed_paths: array<string> — paths changed by this run
field_types.diff_hash: string — sha256 of the resulting working-tree diff/tree
field_types.receipt_hash: string — sha256 over the canonical receipt body (excluding receipt_hash itself)
field_types.no_change_proof: object|null — required when status=='no_change': {satisfying_state, measured_at, evidence}

invariants: each production diff is covered by exactly one operator receipt (status applied|no_change) — AC: 'Cada diff de produção do run é coberto por um operator receipt'
the runner blocks conclusion if `git diff` names a file with no matching receipt — AC: 'O runner bloqueia conclusão se git diff contém arquivo sem receipt correspondente'
the decided change is AC-scoped and points at plan targets — AC: 'A alteração decidida é AC-scoped e aponta para targets do plano'
a target expansion beyond authorized_targets MUST route back to planner/impact gate before continuing — AC: 'Expansão de target volta ao planner/impact gate antes de continuar'

up to three retries preserve failure_fingerprints and change strategy; the same fingerprint must not be repeated indefinitely — AC: 'Até três retries preservam fingerprints e mudam estratégia; não repetem o mesmo failure indefinidamente'

checkpoint is captured before the first mutation; rollback is automatic on validation fail/cancel when safe — AC: 'Checkpoint ocorre antes da primeira mutação e rollback é automático em validation fail/cancel quando seguro'
the operator command, redacted stdout/stderr, and exit code are persisted — AC: 'Comando do dev-cli, stdout/stderr redigidos e exit code são persistidos'
a dev-cli failure NEVER unlocks silent manual LLM editing — AC: 'Falha do dev-cli nunca libera edição manual silenciosa do LLM'
purely mechanical operations do NOT call a remote model when the Runtime can execute them — AC: 'Operações puramente mecânicas não chamam modelo remoto quando o Runtime consegue executá-las'
`no_change` is accepted ONLY with proof the state already satisfied the AC — AC: 'no_change só é aceito com prova de que o estado já satisfazia o AC'
the same receipt schema is produced whether the bridge is invoked via CLI or MCP — AC: 'CLI direta e MCP produzem o mesmo operator receipt schema'
